item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p10","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response wakes up and names the repeated pattern of adding controls for each omission, then moves upstream toward consolidated required inquiry elements and validation rules. However, it still says the requested warranty field can be added today as a temporary emergency field, so it does not fully refuse the N+1 field as the default. This is more than direct field addition, but short of the required hard brake and structural redesign commitment."}
